creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 174724
v1

When running the installer, it complains about " If you want your users to benefit from language, timezone and date/time format negotiation, the INTL module for PHP is required. " if the php56-intl module is not installed.

As for the PDF one, it is used for " In case you want graphs being exported to PDF as well, you'll need the ImageMagick extension for PHP. "
